headline: A Look At Poolcorp (POOL) Valuation After A Short Term Share Price Rebound
summary: Recent share performance context Pool (POOL) has attracted fresh attention after recent price moves, with the stock last closing at US$192.42. Short term performance has been mixed, including a 6.3% gain over the past day and 7.1% over the past week. See our latest analysis for Pool. That sharp 1 day share price return of 6.34% and 7 day return of 7.14% sit against a weaker backdrop, with the year to date share price return down 16.23% and the 1 year total shareholder return down 35.78%. headline: Pool Corporation: Solid Business But Headwinds Persist
summary: Pool Corp (POOL) Q1 sales up 6% as maintenance revenue supports cash flows; shares at lowest PE since 2010. Click here to read my most recent analysis.
